stories.headline: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
stories.summary: Experts say Trump is likely to ignore it, but that even though it carries little power, it is politically significant.

stories.headline: Trump White House requests $87.6bn in spending, including for Iran war

stories.headline: Palestinian boy amongst dead in Israeli strike on displaced tent in Gaza

stories.headline: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
stories.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

stories.headline: Trump Refuses to Sign Housing Bill Until Divisive ‘SAVE’ Voting Act Passes Congress
stories.summary: The president’s announcement declared the bill to be “of minor importance” at the same time that House Republican leaders were heralding it as a major accomplishment.

stories.headline: White House asks Congress for $88 billion for Iran war
stories.summary: The request mostly includes money for the Pentagon, with $67 billion going toward replenishing the military’s stocks of munitions and the cost of sending so many forces to the Middle East.

stories.headline: Our life stops’: West Bank childhood shattered by Israeli military raids
stories.summary: A new UN report documents killings, detentions and lasting psychological harm to Palestinian children.

stories.headline: Trump scraps signing of US housing affordability bill
stories.summary: Bipartisan legislation is designed to boost supply and curb institutional investors’ role in property market

stories.headline: Qualcomm Says Data Center Chips to Produce ‘Billions’ in ’27
stories.summary: Bloomberg's Mandeep Singh previews Micron earnings and the larger tech environment as companies at the forefront of AI forecast massive earnings. Singh said he finds similarities between the hold oil companies have on energy prices with how chip companies have a control of AI memory and are unlikely to increase that capacity as they bring in money.   (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Trump Clashes With Senate Republicans Over Iran in Heated Closed-Door Meeting
stories.summary: The president had a lengthy and angry exchange with Senator Bill Cassidy of Louisiana and lit into other Republicans who voted to check his war powers.

stories.headline: Trump abruptly cancels signing of bipartisan bill on affordable housing
stories.summary: The president posted on social media that the signing was off until the Senate passes his election integrity bill. It is unclear whether he intends to kill the housing bill.

stories.headline: UN nuclear chief says Iran inspections will happen, Tehran says after deal

stories.headline: Europe's five largest military powers meet ahead of key NATO summit with Ukraine in mind

stories.summary: Jinko Solar Co., one of the top five solar manufacturers in China, is looking to recoup expenses this year, as government measures alleviate the chronic overcapacity that has plunged the sector into more than two years of deep losses.
